metadata.title: SYNGO_MF_214
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The data in this paper describe how activation of group I mGluRs (mGluR1 and 5) with DHPG mediates an increase in Ca2+ (measured with Fluo-3) accompanied with an inward current (measure with whole-cell pact clamp) in hippocampal CA1 neurons. These effects were blocked by adding a specific mGluR1 antagonist, but not with a specific mGluR5 antagonist.. Experimental description: from M&M:
"Electrophysiological recording from rat hippocampal slices. Preparation
of hippocampal slices was performed as described previously (Marino et al., 1998). Young rats [Sprague Dawley, age postnatal day (P) P15-P20] were anesthetized deeply with isoflurane and decapitated. "
